历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 11115 → 6744 → 8952 → 16182 → 16830. After the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly shifted backward. In 2025, it remained roughly stable compared to 2024, with a slight backward shift of about 648 places. The recent two-year baseline is approximately 16830. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 46 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 80, a substantial increase of about 42.9% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots and noticeably easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to a nationally renowned comprehensive university.
4. [Reputation Heat] In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major positive or negative public opinion events; Douyin heat total ranking is 41st (relatively hot), once entered the top 10 in 2022 (high heat), attention has declined in recent years but overall stable; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A- and other 6 A- and above disciplines, with strong strength in economics, management, and journalism and communication disciplines, attracting some applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering/medical majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly popular, while economics and management majors show differentiated and wait-and-see attitudes; in 2026, the province's Physics Category examinees are approximately 208,400, roughly stable compared to 2025, with no significant change in the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical rankings in recent two years, the substantial expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 42.9%, and the basically unchanged number of examinees, the competition relief effect brought by expansion is significant. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline of 16830; predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21300, with a range of 20800–21800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category expands significantly by about 42.9%, and the minimum ranking is expected to shift backward to approximately 21300. For rankings within the predicted range (20800–21800), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<20800), focus on Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (>21800), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2614 → 1199 → 1298 → 2995 → 2641. In 2022, it significantly advanced to 1199th place, but after the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, it significantly retreated to 2995th place. In 2025, it slightly recovered to 2641st place, showing large fluctuations in the past two years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 22 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, with a slight reduction in 2025. The 2026 plan is 26 students, a 30% increase from 2025, adding 6 spots, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking approximately 59th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, a nationally renowned comprehensive university. In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major positive or negative public opinion events. Douyin heat total ranking 41st (relatively hot), overall attention stable. Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, etc., with outstanding humanities and social sciences disciplines, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Journalism and Communication, Economics, and Chinese Language and Literature have diverging social popularity. Journalism and Communication has cooled somewhat due to public opinion, while economics and management majors remain stable in popularity. In 2026, the province has approximately 90,600 History Category candidates, basically unchanged from 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings in recent years, the 30% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the basically stable number of candidates, the expansion effect and the ranking recovery trend offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly retreat from the 2025 baseline of 2641. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3200, with a range of 3100–3300.
